stage_directions: Tom looks for his periodic table. (p32)

topics_covered: Course 3 undergraduate gender demographics (digression)
Underrepresented minorities data and questioning data sources
Asphalt-reclaim cutting tools: silicon carbide vs sintered diamond
Slitter knives consulting case (Danvers, ~1984)
EDM (electrical discharge machining)
Step brazing of dissimilar materials
Ashby plot: strength vs fracture toughness
Cubic boron nitride for steel machining
Pad conditioners for semiconductor CMP (correction from prior class)
Cost structure of structural materials industries
Abundance of elements in Earth's crust
Origin of heavy elements (supernovas)
Naturally occurring elements; francium and technetium
Technetium use in medical stress tests
Kentucky school fire case (data validity)
Energy cost of metal production (Ashby data)
Copper ore grades and Bingham mine
Aluminum (bauxite) and Jamaica
Copper extraction via in-situ acid leaching
Silver/gold as copper byproducts; price ratios
Time value of money applied to oil/mineral reserves
Harry Truman's one-armed economist quote
Steel productivity history: Saugus → Bessemer → Carnegie
Basic oxygen furnace (Linz, 1958)
Continuous casting of steel
Bethlehem Steel ingot yield problem; Mike Kimchuk
Eugene Grace bonus scandal (1930s Bethlehem)
Continuous casting of gold at Leach & Garner
Gold theft stories (South Africa egg-salt swap; Attleboro ring throwing; drain excavation)
